creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
Created attachment 222177
grafana7.diff

Updated to Grafana 7.4.0

Release notes: https://grafana.com/blog/2021/02/04/grafana-7.4-released-next-generation-graph-panel-with-30-fps-live-streaming-prometheus-exemplar-support-trace-to-logs-and-more/

Updated:
- distfiles;
- grafana.conf sample to upstream.

Added:
- grafana_config option to rc-script. grafana_conf option has been left for backward compatibility.
- grafana_syslog_output_* options to rc-script for writing daemon logs to syslog.
- creation of grafana provisioning subdirs to plist.

Refactored rc-script.

Removed log-dir creation from rc-script as unnecessary while log.mode=syslog.
